title: lippia lippioides
intro: Lippia lippioides, also known as Brazilian citronella, is a plant species belonging to the Lippia genus, native to Brazil. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Lippia lippioides include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lippia lippioides is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
